---
title: "The Rev. Canon Alexander Colvin Blunt"
---

## The Rev. Canon Alexander Colvin Blunt

### Description

Rector of Millbrook from 1866

### Biography

He married (27 June 1865) Lady Susanna Nelson.

 [<i>Jackson’s Oxford Journal</i>, 30 December 1865)]

### Letters

- Letter from April 14th 1900
- Letter from April 11 [1900]
- Letter from Oct 5th [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
